What does the figure measure as a functi.code:
;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const DepthnmwithHFC_entity Entity)
(declare-const DepthnmwithHFC_series Series)
(declare-const DepthnmwithHFC_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const DepthnmwithHFC_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const DepthnmwithoutH_entity Entity)
(declare-const DepthnmwithoutH_series Series)
(declare-const DepthnmwithoutH_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const DepthnmwithoutH_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(declare-const rank2_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of DepthnmwithHFC_entity) "Depth (nm) with HFC"))
(assert (attr DepthnmwithHFC_series DepthnmwithHFC_entity))
(assert (= (name_of DepthnmwithoutH_entity) "Depth (nm) without HFC"))
(assert (attr DepthnmwithoutH_series DepthnmwithoutH_entity))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 0.0) 2.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 0.25) 1.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 0.25) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 0.5) 0.5))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 0.5) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 0.75) 0.2))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 0.75) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 1.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 1.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 1.25) -0.2))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 1.25) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 1.5) -0.4))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 1.5) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 1.75) -0.6))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 1.75) 0.0))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithHFC_series 2.0) -0.8))
(assert (= (f DepthnmwithoutH_series 2.0) 0.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= DepthnmwithHFC_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= DepthnmwithoutH_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= DepthnmwithHFC_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= DepthnmwithoutH_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= DepthnmwithoutH_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= DepthnmwithoutH_is_dec_bool false))
(assert (= AnsString (name_of DepthnmwithHFC_entity)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsString))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const MassChangengcm_entity Entity)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_series Series)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of MassChangengcm_entity) "Mass Change (ng/cm)"))
(assert (attr MassChangengcm_series MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 2000.0) -500.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 4000.0) -1000.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 6000.0) -1500.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= max_val 0.0))
(assert (= min_val -1500.0))

(assert (= temp_bool_1 false))
(assert (= temp_bool_2 true))
(assert (= rank1_entity MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= AnsString (name_of rank1_entity)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsString))
(exit)

(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const Absorbance_entity Entity)

(assert (attr Absorbance_series Absorbance_entity))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3800.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3750.0) 0.03))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3700.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3650.0) -0.01))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3600.0) -0.01))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3550.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f Absorbance_series 3500.0) 0.0))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const IntensitymV_entity Entity)
(declare-const IntensitymV_series Series)
(declare-const IntensitymV_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const IntensitymV_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of IntensitymV_entity) "Intensity (mV)"))
(assert (attr IntensitymV_series IntensitymV_entity))
(assert (= (f IntensitymV_series 40.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f IntensitymV_series 45.0) 0.0))

  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const BindingEnergyeV_entity Entity)
(declare-const BindingEnergyeV_series Series)
(declare-const BindingEnergyeV_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const BindingEnergyeV_is_dec_bool Bool)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const col0_entity Entity)
(declare-const col0_series Series)
(declare-const col0_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const col0_is_dec_bool Bool)

(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of col0_entity) ""))
(assert (attr col0_series col0_entity))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.005) 0.005))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.01) 0.01))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.015) 0.015))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.02) 0.02))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.025) 0.025))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.03) 0.03))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.035) 0.035))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.04) 0.04))
(assert (= (f col0_series 0.045) 0.045))

(exit)

;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const Geometry_entity Entity)
(declare-const Geometry_series Series)
(declare-const Geometry_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const Geometry_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of Geometry_entity) "Geometry"))
(assert (attr Geometry_series Geometry_entity))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= Geometry_entity Geometry_entity))
(assert (= Geometry_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= Geometry_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= Geometry_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= Geometry_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= AnsBool Geometry_is_dec_bool))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

Is this DFT-proposed HF/H\u2082O thermal.code:
;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const MassChangengcm_entity Entity)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_series Series)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of MassChangengcm_entity) "Mass Change (ng/cm)"))
(assert (attr MassChangengcm_series MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 100.0) -100.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 150.0) -200.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 200.0) -300.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 250.0) -400.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 300.0) -500.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= max_val -100.0))
(assert (= min_val -500.0))
(assert (= cond_bool true))
(assert (= temp_real_1 100.0))
(assert (= temp_real_2 150.0))
(assert (= temp_real_3 200.0))
(assert (= temp_bool_1 true))
(assert (= temp_bool_2 false))
(assert (= rank1_entity MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= AnsBool (= 1.0 0.0)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsBool))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const MassChangengcm_entity Entity)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_series Series)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of MassChangengcm_entity) "Mass Change (ng/cm)"))
(assert (attr MassChangengcm_series MassChangengcm_entity))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 0.0) 0.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 500.0) -200.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 1000.0) -400.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 1500.0) -600.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 2000.0) -800.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 2500.0) -1000.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 3000.0) -1200.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 3500.0) -1400.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 4000.0) -1600.0))
(assert (= (f MassChangengcm_series 4500.0) -1800.0))

(assert (= MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool false))
(assert (= AnsString (name_of MassChangengcm_entity)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (MassChangengcm_is_dec_bool MassChangengcm_is_inc_bool AnsString))
(exit)

  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES

(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS

(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsReal Real)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [KNOWLEDGE BASE] ---
(declare-const BOThickness_entity Entity)
(declare-const BOThickness_series Series)
(declare-const BOThickness_is_inc_bool Bool)
(declare-const BOThickness_is_dec_bool Bool)
(declare-const max_val Real)
(declare-const min_val Real)
(declare-const target_val Real)
(declare-const cond_bool Bool)
(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_2 Real)
(declare-const temp_real_3 Real)
(declare-const temp_bool_1 Bool)
(declare-const temp_bool_2 Bool)
(declare-const rank1_entity Entity)
(assert (= (name_of BOThickness_entity) "BO Thickness ()"))
(assert (attr BOThickness_series BOThickness_entity))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 0.0) 540.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 1.0) 538.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 2.0) 536.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 3.0) 534.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 4.0) 532.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 5.0) 530.0))
(assert (= (f BOThickness_series 6.0) 530.0))
;; --- [PASS 2: Logic & Execution] Attempt 1 ---
(assert (= BOThickness_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= max_val 540.0))
(assert (= min_val 530.0))
(assert (= temp_real_1 540.0))
(assert (= temp_real_2 530.0))
(assert (= temp_real_3 (- temp_real_1)))
(assert (= BOThickness_is_dec_bool true))
(assert (= AnsString (name_of BOThickness_entity)))
(check-sat)
(get-value (AnsReal))
(exit)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

(declare-const temp_real_1 Real)

(assert (= (name_of Intensityarbuni_entity) "Intensity (arb. units)"))
(assert (attr Intensityarbuni_series Intensityarbuni_entity))

(assert (attr Structure_series Structure_entity))

(exit)

  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)

;; --- [PREAMBLE] ---

;; --- UNIVERSAL PREAMBLE ---
;; Logic: Combined Linear Real Arithmetic and Strings (supported by Z3/CVC5)
(set-logic ALL)

;; 1. TYPE DEFINITIONS
(declare-sort Series 0)
(declare-sort Entity 0)
(declare-const epsilon Real)
(assert (= epsilon 0.001))

;; 2. CORE MAPPING FUNCTIONS

;; Maps a Series and a real input (e.g., time) to a real value
(declare-fun f (Series Real) Real)

;; Indicates whether a Series has a given Entity as an attribute
(declare-fun attr (Series Entity) Bool)

;; Returns the string name of an Entity
(declare-fun name_of (Entity) String)

;; Returns the unit (as string) associated with a Series
(declare-fun unit_of (Series) String)

;; 3. GEOMETRIC & TREND PRIMITIVES

;; Computes absolute difference between two real numbers
(define-fun diff ((a Real) (b Real)) Real
  (ite (>= (- a b) 0.0) (- a b) (- b a)))

;; Checks if Series s1 is significantly greater than s2 at point x (with tolerance epsilon)
(define-fun is_gt ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s1 and s2 are approximately equal at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_eq ((s1 Series) (s2 Series) (x Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s1 x) (f s2 x)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is increasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_inc ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x2) (f s x1)) epsilon))

;; Checks if Series s is decreasing between x1 and x2 (beyond epsilon threshold)
(define-fun is_dec ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (> (- (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 4. EXTREMA & INTERSECTION

;; Checks if Series s has value approximately equal to y at point x (within epsilon)
(define-fun is_at_val ((s Series) (x Real) (y Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x) y) epsilon))

;; Checks if x_m is a local peak (maximum) compared to neighbors x_l and x_r
(define-fun is_peak ((s Series) (x_l Real) (x_m Real) (x_r Real)) Bool
  (and (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_l)) (>= (f s x_m) (f s x_r))))

;; Checks if Series s is approximately constant between x1 and x2
(define-fun is_const ((s Series) (x1 Real) (x2 Real)) Bool
  (<= (diff (f s x1) (f s x2)) epsilon))

;; 5. STANDARDIZED OUTPUT VARIABLES
(declare-const AnsBool Bool)
(declare-const AnsReal Real)
(declare-const AnsString String)
